overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a neon-lit night market with Japanese-inspired architecture. The player walks through wet streets reflecting colorful neon signs, enters a ramen shop under a striped awning, and explores the interior with its glowing signage, food displays, and seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit night market pedestrian street with wet reflective pavement

events.description: turning right toward the ramen shop area while walking through the market

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit night market street, passing various storefronts and glowing signs

traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging above the street
wet tiled pavement reflecting colorful neon lights
storefronts with various neon signage and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Walking through a vibrant cyberpunk night market with wet streets reflecting purple, pink, and green neon signs. The 'Jacked and Coke' sign dominates the right side while red paper lanterns hang overhead. Sparse pedestrians walk through the open plaza as the camera moves toward a ramen shop entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ramen shop entrance with striped awning

events.description: entering the covered ramen shop area from the open market street
interior warm lighting becomes dominant as camera moves under the striped awning

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the ramen shop under the black and white striped awning

notable_agents.action: shop vendor standing behind the counter preparing food

entered.detail: black and white striped canvas awning over the shop entrance
circular neon sign depicting a ramen bowl with Japanese characters
wooden counter with stools and condiment dispensers
pink illuminated paper lanterns flanking the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving under the striped awning into the ramen shop entrance, transitioning from open neon-lit street to a sheltered space. The circular ramen bowl neon sign glows prominently as the camera approaches the wooden counter where a vendor stands. The lighting shifts from cool neon to warmer interior tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of 24-hour ramen shop with counter and seating

events.description: turning left to examine the illuminated food display cases along the wall
moving toward the rear seating area with the red 24-hour neon sign

agents.ego_description: exploring the interior of the ramen shop, examining the counter, food displays, wall-mounted TVs, and seating area

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the counter near the ramen neon sign
customers sitting at the rear tables near the red neon sign

entered.detail: illuminated glass display cases showing various food items and ingredients
television screens mounted on the wall showing news broadcasts
bright red neon sign with Japanese text '24時間営業' indicating 24-hour service
wooden dining tables with stools in the customer seating area
posters and advertisements on the dark interior walls

segments.scene_description: Exploring the dimly lit interior of the ramen shop, panning across food display cases and wall-mounted TVs showing news. The vendor works behind the counter near the glowing ramen sign while customers sit at rear tables under a bright red '24-hour service' neon sign. The camera moves through the seating area, revealing wooden tables and atmospheric interior details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-drenched night market into the warm, atmospheric interior of a ramen shop. It begins by gliding through an open plaza with wet streets reflecting purple, pink, and green lights, passing under red paper lanterns and a dominant Jacked and Coke sign. As the camera approaches the shop, it moves under a striped awning, transitioning from the cool glow of the street to a sheltered space marked by a prominent circular ramen bowl neon sign. The scene then shifts further inside, where the lighting turns warmer as the camera pans across food display cases and wall-mounted TVs. Finally, the movement flows past the vendor at the wooden counter and through the seating area, ending beneath a bright red 24-hour service sign.
